title: All Is Calm
overview: When Dennis's family can't be together for Christmas, he finds a new way to share the real story of the season and bring peace and calm in the midst of his family's chaotic world. Over 300 musicians and creatives from North Carolina and Los Angeles (safely) came together to tell this original story.
